summary: Frontend testing completed for /thank-you-booking page redesign. All 7 sections working correctly with Precision Craft design system. Fixed mobile sticky bar issue.
tests_passed: Hero section: checkmark circle with accent border, eyebrow 'BOOKING CONFIRMED', H1 'You're All Set!', 30 min call text, two buttons (Call + Email)
What Happens Next: 4 step cards with ghost numbers (Confirmation Sent, We Call Ahead, $60 Diagnostic, Fixed & Warranted)
Need to Reschedule section: 3 contact cards (Call or Text, Send a Text, Email Us) with working action buttons
Prepare for Visit: 5 checklist items with checkmark circles
Leave a Review section: 3 review buttons (Google blue #4285F4, Yelp red #D32323, Thumbtack cyan #009fd9) opening in new tab
Related Links section: 8 pill links (Home, All Services, Brands We Repair, Service Areas, Customer Reviews, Tips & Guides, About FixitBay, San Francisco)
SEO: title 'Booking Confirmed — Thank You | FixitBay LLC', noindex meta tag present, meta description, canonical URL
Review buttons link to external sites with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'
critical_code_review_comments: Checkmarks (\u2713) used in hero and checklist are Unicode symbols, not graphical emojis - acceptable per design spec
context_for_next_testing_agent: ThankYouBooking page complete with Precision Craft design. StickyCTA.jsx now excludes /thank-you-booking path. All 7 sections verified: Hero, What Happens Next, Need to Reschedule, Prepare for Visit, Leave a Review, Related Links, Footer.

fix_applied.issue: Mobile sticky bar was showing on /thank-you-booking page when it should be hidden per requirements
fix_applied.fix: Added route exclusion logic using useLocation hook to hide the mobile bar on /thank-you-booking
